verbatim_text: You just joined my lab. Jeremy never talked to me again. And we actually published many, many papers together. And it was really, really fun. The crazy thing is actually, I'll do it fine for this. Back then, we actually didn't call him Yu. We called him Yu. Yu Sun was how he introduced himself. And that worked well, except it made horrible, a little horrible misunderstanding. And the very, very worst one was when I actually, in the upper two years, I got an offer from Cornell. And I decided to go to Cornell. And I had two grad students, Jake, Matt, and I had Yu in my lab. And I first told Matt, I'm going to Cornell. You can come with me if you want to.
